name: Coin Machine
author: Poki
description: Coin Machine is a merge game where you're in charge of your very own money-making machine! Drop coins, place power-up chips in the perfect spots, and watch as every bounce increases your earnings. Strategically unlock new upgrades and chip positions to multiply your profits and keep the money flowing. Can you build the ultimate cash-printing machine? How to play Coin Machine? Click or tap to select the item. Click and hold to merge. Who created Coin Machine? Coin Machine is created by Kuyi Mobile. Play their other games on Poki: Sushi Merge and Tower Merge ! How can I play Coin Machine for free? You can play Coin Machine for free on Poki. Can I play Coin Machine on mobile devices and desktop? Coin Machine can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
